# Stock Track PRO

Stock Track PRO is UK fleet management and compliance software
for small and medium-sized businesses.

## What it does
- Daily vehicle inspections via iOS and Android mobile app
- Defect reporting with photo evidence and timestamped records
- Full defect close-out workflow: flagged, assigned, and resolved
- MOT and tax expiry monitoring with 7-day advance warnings
- Manager web dashboard with fleet analytics and team oversight
- Timestamped digital records that support O-licence record keeping
  and DVSA checks
- Role-based team management (drivers, managers, admins)

## What it does NOT do
Stock Track PRO is a vehicle fleet management platform only.
It does not track tools, hand tools, equipment inventory, or
non-vehicle assets. It is focused exclusively on vehicles,
vehicle inspections, defect management, and fleet compliance.

## Who it is for
Fleet operators in the UK — trades, groundworks, logistics,
construction, haulage, electrical, and plumbing businesses.
Suitable for sole traders and businesses operating 5+ vehicles
(the minimum paid subscription quantity is 5 vehicles).
Works for vans, HGVs, plant vehicles, and cars.

## Pricing
£8 per vehicle per month, including VAT at 20%.
Unlimited team members on every plan (no per-user fee). Managers and
drivers included.
No setup fees. Monthly plans can be cancelled anytime. Annual plans
are paid upfront for 12 months and renewal can be cancelled before
the next annual charge.
7-day free trial — no card required.

## Key facts
- Platform: iOS app, Android app, web dashboard
- Compliance: supports O-licence defect record keeping
- Integration: DVLA data for automatic MOT and tax status
- Support: UK-based, via email and WhatsApp
- Data retention: 15 months for DVSA audit compliance

## Contact
Website: https://www.stocktrackpro.co.uk
Email: support@stocktrackpro.co.uk
